top_signals.title: Here are the five big takeaways from Kevin Warsh's first meeting as Fed chairman
top_signals.summary: The Federal Reserve and Chairman Kevin Warsh on Wednesday followed the script on interest rates closely.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Germany Considers Extending Oil Reserve Relief Despite Falling Prices
top_signals.summary: Germany may be getting cold feet about ending its oil reserve waiver. Berlin said this week it is considering extending a temporary reduction in national oil stockpiling requirements beyond the current August 31 deadline, even as markets celebrate the U.S.-Iran agreement and the expected reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. Officially, Germany insists there are no physical shortages. That's true. But governments generally don't keep discussing emergency measures when they're completely comfortable with the situation. Germany joined the International…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU leaders warn on China imbalances but respond cautiously
top_signals.summary: Without mentioning Beijing, leaders directed the European Commission to "develop and eventually complement" the bloc's toolbox of trade defenses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New Texas power grid allocation framework could lift bitcoin miners turned data center operators
top_signals.summary: The Electric Reliability Council of Texas says data centers account for nearly 90% of the 438 GW of large-load demand in the state.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
